creator: kkennawa@physics.adelaide.edu.au
text:
On Sun, 7 Feb 1999, Juergen Lock wrote:

> 	I'm trying to port GNU-WIN32 as a cross-compiler and its distfile
> 	comes compressed with bzip2.  so here is a port:

What's wrong with /usr/ports/archivers/bzip2/?

There's even USE_BZIP2 in ports makefiles for automatic extraction of .tar.bz2
distfiles now.

Kris

(ASP) Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) announced today that the release of its 
productivity suite, Office 2000, will be delayed until the first quarter
of 1901.
